title: Interleaved Image-Text Training
concept: Multimodal models are trained on documents containing mixed images and text, learning to reason across both modalities jointly.

exercises.prompt: What does it mean if an AI model is "multimodal"?

options.text: It can process different types of inputs like text and images.

exercises.explain: Multimodal models are designed to handle multiple types of data, such as images, text, and audio, at the same time.

cards.title: Reading Like a Human
cards.body: Have you ever wondered how an AI can read a webpage that has photos right in the middle of sentences? Instead of looking at images and text separately, modern AI learns from documents where they are woven together!

cards.title: What is Interleaved Training?
cards.body: Interleaved Image-Text Training feeds an AI model documents where images and text are mixed together naturally (like on a blog post or news site). This teaches the model to understand the relationship between what is written and what is shown.

cards.title: The Comic Book Analogy
cards.body: Imagine reading a comic book. If you only look at the drawings, you miss the plot. If you only read the speech bubbles, you miss the action. By reading both together panel by panel, you understand the whole story. Interleaved training teaches AI to read the 'comic book' of the internet.

cards.title: Interleaved Data in Action
cards.body: Think of a cooking blog. It might say: "First, chop the onions like this:" followed by [Image of chopped onions], and then "Next, fry them until golden:" followed by [Image of frying pan]. The AI learns to connect the instructions directly to the visual steps.

cards.title: Myth: Just Captions?
cards.body: People often think AI only learns from clean pairs of one single image and one short caption. In reality, real-world AI is trained on messy, multi-page articles where images and text flow together naturally.

cards.title: Split vs. Interleaved
cards.body: Comparing traditional split training with modern interleaved training.

left.text: Images and text are kept in separate folders. The AI struggles to connect them in long stories.

right.text: Images and text are woven together in a single stream, just like a real website.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is the best example of interleaved image-text data?

options.text: A folder containing only JPG images.
A plain text dictionary with no illustrations.
A travel blog post with photos placed between paragraphs.
An audio recording of a book.

exercises.explain: Interleaved training uses documents where images and text are mixed together in any order, mimicking real websites.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Interleaved training helps AI generate text that refers directly to images that came before it.
exercises.explain: By learning from mixed sequences, the AI learns to predict the next word or next image in a sequence, allowing it to generate both.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank to describe the training method that mixes modalities.
exercises.sentence: To teach AI to read webpages with mixed media, we use ________ training.
exercises.explain: Interleaved training mixes text and images together in a single sequence, just like a standard webpage.

exercises.prompt: Which response shows an AI that has been successfully trained on interleaved image-text data?

options.text: AI: "Based on the chart above showing a downward trend, you should reduce your budget."
AI: "I cannot see any images, but budgets are important for business."
AI: "Error: Visual input not supported in text mode."

exercises.explain: Option A is generated by a model trained on interleaved data because it successfully references both the image and the surrounding text to answer. Option B is just a generic text-only response, and Option C is an unrelated error.

exercises.prompt: Why is interleaved image-text training so effective for building modern multimodal AI assistants?

options.text: It trains the model only on pure images first, then pure text later.
It trains the model on mixed sequences of text and images in their natural order.
It forces the model to convert all images into audio files.
It completely separates visual data from text data to avoid confusion.

exercises.explain: Interleaved training is powerful because it mirrors how humans naturally document information, allowing the model to handle any arbitrary sequence of images and text, like a webpage or a book.
